topic: percent change in perimeter with geometric shapes
latex: Let a side length of the square be $x$. The original perimeter is $4x$. In adding the equilateral triangle, one of the side lengths of the square is eliminated while two congruent side lengths of the triangle are added. Thus, the final perimeter is $5x$. The increase in perimeter is $\frac{5x-4x}{4x} = ?$
